description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with palm trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout with large windows and sliding glass doors, allowing for ample natural light. The front of the bungalow includes a driveway leading to the main entrance, with a small garden area and decorative plants. The rear of the property has a private outdoor space, possibly a patio or backyard, enclosed by the same boundary wall. The exterior is finished in light colors, primarily white and gray, with wooden accents visible around windows and doors. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, openness, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, enclosed by a low wall and accented with palm trees and wood details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, garden, and several palm trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, flat roof, and boundary wall, with visible windows and a glimpse of the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private outdoor space, more palm trees, and the back facade with large windows and sliding doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, flat roof, and the continuation of the boundary wall and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
